title: sustello #4958
definition:
1) to place together
    1a) to draw together, contact
        1a1) to diminish
        1a2) to shorten, abridge
        1a3) the time has been drawn together into a brief compass,
             is shortened
    1b) to roll together, wrap up, wrap around with bandages, etc.,
        to enshroud
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to place together
    1a) to draw together, contact
        1a1) to diminish
        1a2) to shorten, abridge
        1a3) the time has been drawn together into a brief compass,
             is shortened
    1b) to roll together, wrap up, wrap around with bandages, etc.,
        to enshroud

    NASB:  to draw together, hence wrap up:
